title: Snap Inc. Announces Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2020 Financial Results
text:
Snap Inc. Announces Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2020 Financial Results

Q4 2020 Performance

Revenue increased 62% to $911 million in Q4 2020, compared to the prior year. Daily active users were 265 million at the end of Q4 2020, an increase of 35 million or 15% year-over-year. Net loss was $113 million in Q4 2020, compared to a net loss of $192 million in the prior year.

Full Year 2020 Results

For full year 2020, revenue was $2.5 billion, compared to $1.75 billion in 2019, representing 43% growth. The company achieved positive adjusted EBITDA of $346 million and positive free cash flow of $202 million. Full year operating cash flow was $286 million, compared to $27 million in 2019.

Business Momentum

The full year 2020 results reflected strong advertiser demand during the pandemic period, with broad-based growth across all advertising verticals. The company's ability to navigate the global pandemic and deliver strong results positioned it for continued growth.

User Growth

Full year DAUs grew 21% year-over-year, demonstrating the platform's ability to attract and retain users. The global user base continued to expand, with particular strength in international markets.
